production_note: agentic_H2 dual-LLM Skeptic: solved from quiz_card+slim_packet only; independent of H1; packet-only; no stamps; direct agent output; no prior-attempt lives
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content (quiz_card + slim_packet).

exercises.code:
# Skeptic: invert starter defect; keep fixture data
CANON = ["intake", "er", "relation_graph", "features", "model_score", "queue"]
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T1A",
    "stages": list(CANON),
    "label_space": "needs_review",
    "auto_fraud": False,
}
meets = record["stages"] == list(CANON) and record["label_space"] == "needs_review"
status = "PASS" if bool(meets) else "REJECT_STAGE_ORDER"
print("S39-T1-A", status)

exercises.code:
# Skeptic: invert starter defect; keep fixture data
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2B",
    "score": 0.9,
    "threshold": 0.7,
    "human_action": "skip",
}
auto = "queue" if record["score"] >= record["threshold"] else "skip"
final = record["human_action"] if record.get("human_action") is not None else auto
override = record.get("human_action") is not None
meets = final == record.get("human_action") and override is True
status = "PASS" if bool(meets) else "REJECT_OVERRIDE"
print("S39-T2-B", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Skeptic S39-T2-B-E1: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card/slim_packet. Defectos invertidos o TODO resueltos; ancla `record = {`. Soporte: «S39-T2-B-E1 · Aplica override humano sobre `CASO-LIM-039-T2B`. Entrada: score, threshold, human_acti». Intento agentic_H2 independiente de H1.

Skeptic S39-T2-B-E2: contrasté starter vs instruction del quiz_card/slim_packet. Defectos invertidos o TODO resueltos; ancla `def assess(record: dict) -> str:`. Soporte: «S39-T2-B-E2 · Tres decisiones: auto queue sin humano (`PASS` con final queue), override a skip (`PAS». Intento agentic_H2 independiente de H1.

exercises.code:
# Skeptic: invert starter defect; keep fixture data
checklist = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T3A",
    "pii_minimized": True,
    "rbac": True,
    "secrets_in_repo": False,
    "slice_metrics": True,
    "input_limits": True,
}
meets = all([
    checklist["pii_minimized"],
    checklist["rbac"],
    not checklist["secrets_in_repo"],
    checklist["slice_metrics"],
    checklist["input_limits"],
])
status = "PASS" if bool(meets) else "REJECT_RELEASE"
print("S39-T3-A", status)
